# SCUBA Diving

The UMB Research Dive Safety program, with all forms, is located [here](https://www.umb.edu/research/research-sponsored-programs/integrity-compliance/research-safety-security/) under Diving Research & Safety Program.

To file a dive plan, see [here](https://aaus.divingscientists.org/dive-plans/add) - this is on the AAUS site.

To log dives, see [here](https://aaus.divingscientists.org/?ref=umassb.diveaaus.com)
